text: We will ensure that workers receive a real living wage and better protections at work.
Families across the country deserve better public services and affordable housing.
Our NHS staff have been overworked and underpaid for far too long.
We will scrap tuition fees so that students are not saddled with debt.
Pensioners must not have to choose between heating and eating this winter.
We have created more jobs for young people than ever before.
Small business owners are the backbone of the British economy.
We will recruit 20000 more police officers to keep our communities safe.
Hard-working families deserve to keep more of their own money.
Criminals who commit violent offences must face the full force of the law.
The rich are getting richer whilst everyone else struggles to make ends meet.
Migrants make enormous contributions to our economy our public services and our culture.
People with disabilities have been failed by years of austerity.
Farmers must be supported to transition to sustainable practices.
Future generations deserve a planet that is liveable and just.
Teachers and school staff need proper investment not endless reorganisation.
Refugees fleeing war and persecution must be welcomed with dignity.
Carers do invaluable work and deserve recognition and support.
Self-employed workers have been left behind by the current tax system.
LGBTQ+ people still face discrimination that we must legislate to end.
